title: Defect - RBAC and Status Enforcement
description: Fix missing Admin vs GM roles, enforce blocked user status, and fix UI badge case sensitivity.
execution_steps: Add 'role' to User model and schemas.
Seed Admin user with role='Admin' in main.py.
Add get_current_active_user and get_admin_user to dependencies.py.
Add /auth/me endpoint to return current user info.
Update App.tsx to fetch /auth/me and route based on role.
definition_of_done: Admin role is enforced on /admin endpoints.
Blocked users cannot authenticate via dependencies.
UI correctly shows Admin vs GM views.
